column1: # Candidate beta-globin validation samples from 1000G 30x (3202-sample phased panel)
# Coordinates confirmed by POPULATION DISTRIBUTION, not rsID (panel carries no rsIDs).
#   HbE      chr11:5226943 C>T  AC=18  EAS 0.0077 / SAS 0.0075, absent AFR+EUR -> matches the HbE belt
#   CD41-42  chr11:5226762 CAAAG>C AC=5  EAS-exclusive -> matches commonest S-Chinese beta-0 allele
#   control  chr11:5227002 T>A  AC=184 AF_AFR=0.100 -> textbook HbS/rs334, validates the coordinate frame
# READ-LEVEL CONFIRMATION (2026-07-22, remote CRAM slice, no download):
#   HG02379 CD41-42 chr11:5226762  DP=26, 12 deletion events        -> het 4bp del
#   HG02379 PHASE: 4 fragments span both sites; 1x (HbE=ref,CD41-42=DEL), 3x (HbE=alt,CD41-42=ref)
#     -> TRANS. Genuine HbE/beta-0 compound heterozygote, confirmed independently of panel phasing.
#     CAVEAT n=4 fragments is thin. Phenotype UNKNOWN - 1000G subjects are nominally healthy and
#     HbE/beta-0 severity is variable. Do NOT record as 'affected' without clinical data.
# Remote slicing works - downloading whole CRAMs is usually unnecessary:
#   REF_PATH is REQUIRED: local hg38.fa MD5s do not match the 1000G analysis set.
# Related pairs - use only ONE of each: SH068(HG00625,HG00627) BD01(HG03007,HG03008) BD17(HG03800,HG03801)
# NOTE: 4 carriers (HG00627 HG03008 HG03801 HG03929) live in the 698-RELATED collection,
